title: 【转载】颤抖吧EA，俄杜马提议为俄罗斯工作的黑客应当免责
meta_description: 【转载】颤抖吧EA，俄杜马提议为俄罗斯工作的黑客应当免责 - 文章转自reddit  MOSCOW, February 10 - RIA Novosti. "White" hackers on the territory of the Russian Federation or outside i...
meta_keywords: 转载,颤抖,ea,杜马,提议,俄罗斯,工作,黑客,应当,免责
contents:
文章转自reddit

MOSCOW, February 10 - RIA Novosti. "White" hackers on the territory of the Russian Federation or outside it should be released from liability if they act in the interests of Russia, said Alexander Khinshtein, head of the Duma Committee on Information Policy.

"We are talking about, in general, working out an exemption from liability for those persons who act in the interests of the Russian Federation in the field of computer information both on the territory of our country and abroad. But we will talk in more detail when we receive it clear wording," he told reporters.


2.10，俄杜马信息委员会主席 Khinshtein 提议，为俄罗斯工作的黑客应当被免责，让我想到之前一月中俄黑客炸了战地服务器的壮举，颤抖吧EA。

前情提要：

前几天是谁来着，说游戏开挂是支性？中国大陆游戏玩家联合俄国人一起把EA整个洲的服务器都给炸了 - 新·品葱

https://pincong.rocks/question/55563
